description: Recorded Task call payload sent by the orchestrator to codex-review-prompter when it acts as the external aggregator. This is the FR-MR9 input envelope with judge_mode_prompt injected per Step 8g.

config.judge_mode_prompt: You are acting as an impartial judge consolidating findings from multiple reviewers. Evaluate each finding on its merits, free of attribution bias. Position randomization has been applied to the input.
